A warning: stay away from this app. It will make itself impossible to cancel, turning back on auto-pay and charging you for the longest possible subscription. Apart from the product itself, the pricing model is as close to a scam as you can get without presumably violating playstore rules. If you manage to find out where they have hidden auto-pay settings, the app WILL turn it back on without notifying you. Avoid.

This app has changed my sleep completely for the better. However, it took me weeks to figure out that if I just hit play at the bottom to start the same audio from the previous night it does not count toward my daily use. I have to browse Sleep each night, play something else, then go back to the original audio for it to count. Annoying, but only because I like to earn tracking badges.

And to top it off, following the instructions to cancel the service goes to the Google play store so I can't even figure out how to unsubscribe.
